untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) yield spread measurement vs comparable instrument (not in allowed indicators), (2) macro indicator integration (unemployment, credit conditions, recession signals - external data not available), (3) valuation ratio in historical percentile context (no fundamental valuation ratios in allowed set), (4) multi-day signal persistence tracking. These require external data sources and state tracking beyond price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy translation using available indicators: hvol_20 for volatility extremes, returns for reversion extremes (suggesting dislocation), and rsi_14 for exhaustion. However, core signal logic around yield spreads, macro contradictions, and fundamental valuations cannot be properly expressed with the allowed technical indicator set. This signal fundamentally requires fixed income data, macroeconomic feeds, and valuation databases outside the scope of price-based technical analysis.
